name: Chocolate Mousse Flan
recipeInstructions:
You need a 9 ½-inch flan pan with a removable bottom to make this spectacular looking dessert.
PASTRY: Combine flour, icing sugar and melted chocolate. Cut in softened butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs, then form into a ball with your hands. Press into the bottom and sides of the flan ring pan that has been greased. Chill for 1 hour. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes; cool.
MOUSSE FILLING: Bring whipping cream to a boil, add melted chocolate and butter, stirring until melted. Blend in egg yolks well, remove from heat. Beat egg whites until frothy, gradually add sugar, beating until stiff peaks form. Gently fold into the chocolate mixture and pour over the pastry crust. Chill for 10 minutes.
GARNISH: Shortly before serving, sprinkle grated chocolate (3 squares) over the mousse using a vegetable peeler to make curls. Lay strips of wax paper across the flan. Sift icing sugar over the flan; remove the wax paper.
NB: Don't make or serve this on a hot day; it will melt.
